(c) The Moon being posited in Virgo, Scorpio,

(d) The Sun in Leo or Aquarius receiving the aspect of

In the light of the above principles, one can safely find
out, if any tendencies for appendicitis are to be found in a
horoscope.
Chart No. 117.—Data of birth withheld for obvious
reasons.
In the typical horoscope we are illustrating herewith,
certain fundamental factors are evident.

Concerning the Sixth House 279
The Lagna is Gemini, while in the Navamsa a watery
sign rises. The lord of Lagna is in the 3rd with the Sun and
Jupiter but afflicted on account of Papakarthari Yoga. Mars,
lord of the 6th (disease), is in the 2nd—a watery sign. If we
accept the zodiacal rulerships, then we find that the Moon
and Rahu in a sensitive place like Virgo, coupled with the
presence of Mars in Cancer, suggest the stomach and
